Place your wedding background music here.
Filename: lagu.mp3 (or wedding-bgm.mp3)
Recommended: soft piano/orchestral instrumental, ~3-5 minutes, loopable.

Sources for royalty-free music:
- https://pixabay.com/music/search/wedding/
- https://freemusicarchive.org
- https://www.bensound.com/royalty-free-music/track/romantic
